productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Real A Jsy Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black short sleeves round neck football jersey made of 100% polyester, ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, mesh panels on the sides, adidas' three stripes appliqued on both sleeves in gold, gold piping on cuff, team badge on right sleeve, brand name and logo embroidered on right chest, team logo transferred onto the left chest, graphic print in bold lettering on the chest, brand badge with 3-D hologram near the hem on the right, and engineered with the ClimaCool technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo If you eat, sleep, breathe football, and your heart beats for the Spanish football club Real Madrid, this black football jersey from adidas is your ideal companion. Wear it when you're cheering for your favourite team, playing football, or just hanging out at the mall. And forget about sweat as the ClimaCool technology will keep it at bay. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks and score not just on the field, but also off it! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
